name: Honey-Mustard Baked Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Place chicken pieces in a shallow baking pan, skin side up.
3. Combine butter, honey, mustard, garlic salt, and curry powder in a bowl; mix well.
4. Pour the mixture over the chicken.
5. Bake for 1-1/4 hours, basting every 15 minutes, until chicken is tender and nicely browned.
